title: Store Supervisor
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a highly organized and experienced Warehouse Supervisor to oversee daily warehouse operations across multiple company facilities. The ideal candidate will lead a team of 10 storekeepers, ensure smooth inventory management, and optimize processes using advanced warehouse technologies including robotics systems, automated storage and retrieval systems (AS/RS), and enterprise resource planning tools (SAP Business One).

Key Responsibilities:

  • Team Leadership & Supervision
  • Manage, train, and motivate a team of 10 storekeepers.
  • Assign tasks, monitor performance, and ensure adherence to safety and operational standards.
  • Foster a culture of accountability, teamwork, and continuous improvement.
  • Warehouse Operations
  • Oversee inbound and outbound logistics, including receiving, storage, picking, packing, and dispatch.
  • Coordinate warehouse processes across multiple companies under one warehouse location.
  • Ensure compliance with company policies, safety regulations, and industry standards.
  • Operate and supervise robotics systems for automated storage and retrieval.
  • Utilize Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) for efficient inventory control.
  • Manage ERP processes using SAP Business One for accurate reporting and integration with business functions.
  • Conduct routine safety checks and enforce compliance with occupational health and safety guidelines.
  • Process Optimization
  • Implement best practices to improve warehouse efficiency and reduce operational costs.
  • Monitor KPIs such as order accuracy, inventory turnover, and fulfilment speed.
  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives leveraging automation and digital tools.

Qualifications

  • Minimum Qualification: O Level, ITE Nitec, Diploma
  • Proven experience as a Warehouse Supervisor or similar role.
  • Strong leadership and people management skills.
  • Hands-on experience with WMS and ERP systems (SAP Business One preferred).
  • Knowledge of robotics systems and automated storage/retrieval technologies.
  • Possessing a Valid forklift license will be preferred
  • Excellent organizational, problem-solving, and communication skills.
  • Ability to manage multi-company warehouse processes effectively.

Competencies

  • Leadership & Team Management
  • Process Optimization & Continuous Improvement
  • Technical Proficiency (Robotics, WMS, ERP)
  • Safety & Compliance Awareness
  • Analytical Thinking & Decision-Making

postedCompany.description:
SERVO DYNAMICS
A leading automation and industrial solution provider

Our group is dedicated to promoting and providing solutions for motion control technologies and developing business opportunities for mechanical and electronic (mechatronics) motion control companies. Our partners and customers includes manufacturers of complete motion control systems, component manufacturers, system integrators, distributors, end users, consulting firms, academic institutions and research groups directly involved with mechanical and electronic (mechatronics) motion control around the world.

Our group has over thirty years of experience serving global automation companies involved in robotics, machine vision, motion control and related technologies.

Dedicated to providing cost-effective motion control systems to OEM customers, we provide extensive in-house expertise to minimize time-to-market and maximize customer satisfaction. When integrating our products into your design, you can develop your own motion control systems and modules while utilizing your current platforms and standards. This makes design changes and upgrades easy to manage. No other industrial motion control company offers the same cost-effective range of products, as well as a comprehensive technical support structure.

Together with subsidiaries and dealers located in Singapore,  India, Vietnam, Malaysia, Thailand, China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Philippines and Indonesia, we provide total solution for industrial automation needs with our highly complementary products, and bridge the high technology to the developing countries in across the Asia-Pacific.
